findings.description: The source contains 9 h2-level headings (underlined with ===): StringConvertor, StringArrayConvertor, BigDecimalConvertor, IntegerConvertor, LongConvertor, RequiredValidator, LengthValidator, NumberRangeValidator, SystemCharValidator. All 9 are consolidated into a single section s1 in the knowledge file. This 9:1 consolidation may reduce retrieval granularity when users ask about a specific class.
findings.source_evidence: Source has 9 distinct === sections; knowledge file has only s1.
